instructions: Lie on your side with knees bent and feet together. Keeping your feet touching, lift your top knee while keeping hips stable. Lower slowly and repeat.
Lie face down with hands under shoulders. Press into your palms and lift your chest while keeping hips grounded. Hold and breathe.
Step one foot forward into a lunge. Raise arms overhead and sink hips down while keeping your chest upright.
Step one leg diagonally behind the other and bend both knees. Return to standing and repeat on the other side.
Lie on your back with arms extended upward and knees bent at 90°. Lower opposite arm and leg slowly, then return and switch sides.
Start on hands and knees. Keeping knee bent, lift one leg upward toward the ceiling. Lower and repeat before switching sides.
From hands and knees, lift hips toward the ceiling forming an inverted V. Press heels toward the floor and lengthen the spine.
Quickly tighten and release your pelvic floor muscles. Perform rapid contractions for 10–15 repetitions.
Lie on your back and cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Pull the supporting leg toward your chest to stretch the hip.
On hands and knees, lift one knee out to the side while keeping hips stable. Lower slowly and repeat.
Squat deeply with feet flat. Bring palms together at chest and press elbows against knees to open hips.
Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat. Lift hips upward by squeezing glutes, then lower slowly.
Sit tall with knees bent. Slowly roll halfway back while engaging core, then return to upright position.
Lie on your back and grab the outsides of your feet with knees bent. Gently pull knees toward the floor.
Jump laterally from one foot to the other, swinging the opposite leg behind you. Maintain balance and control.
Perform a glute bridge while tightening pelvic floor muscles at the top. Hold briefly before lowering.
In a bridge position, tighten pelvic floor and slowly lift one foot off the ground. Alternate sides.
Tighten pelvic floor muscles as if stopping urine flow. Hold for 5 seconds, relax for 5 seconds. Repeat 10 times.
Lie on your back and pull one or both knees toward your chest. Hold and breathe deeply.
Lie flat on your back and slowly lift both legs upward. Lower them back down with control.
Lie on your back with legs extended vertically against a wall. Relax and breathe deeply.
Lie face down and lift chest, arms, and legs off the floor simultaneously. Hold briefly and lower.
Step forward and bend both knees until the back knee nearly touches the floor. Return and switch legs.
Step into a lunge and lower the back knee to the floor. Push hips forward gently to stretch hip flexors.
Lie on your back, lift hips into a bridge, and alternate lifting one knee toward your chest.
Perform a shallow squat while tightening pelvic floor muscles. Hold briefly and return to standing.
Stand tall with feet together and arms at your sides. Engage your core and pelvic floor, lengthen your spine, and breathe deeply.
Lie on your back with knees bent. Gently tilt your pelvis upward to flatten your lower back against the floor, then release.
From a plank position, bring one knee forward toward your wrist and extend the other leg back. Lower hips and hold the stretch.
Lie on your back, cross one ankle over the opposite knee, and gently pull the bottom thigh toward your chest.
Hold your body in a straight line supported by your forearms and toes. Engage core and pelvic floor.
From a forearm plank, rotate hips side to side, lightly tapping the floor while keeping core engaged.
Start in a push-up position with arms straight. Keep body aligned and engage your pelvic floor.
Stand with feet wider than hip-width and toes turned out. Lower into a squat while engaging pelvic floor.
Lower your body from a plank position until elbows bend to 90 degrees, then push back up.
Lie on your back, bring soles of feet together, and let knees fall outward. Relax and breathe deeply.
Lie on your back, lift both legs slightly off the floor, and alternate crossing them over each other.
Lie on your back with knees bent. Press through heels to lift hips toward the ceiling, then lower slowly.
Step one foot out to the side and bend that knee while keeping the other leg straight. Push back to start.
Lie on your side with legs straight. Lift the top leg upward, then lower with control.
Lie on your side and lift your top leg repeatedly while keeping hips stacked and core engaged.
From a bridge position, extend one leg and lift hips upward using the grounded heel.
Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift your torso toward your knees, then lower back down.
Tighten your pelvic floor muscles slowly, hold for 5–10 seconds, then fully relax.
Lie on your stomach and prop yourself up on your forearms. Lift chest gently and hold.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower hips back and down, then return to standing.
Quickly tighten your pelvic floor muscles, then release immediately. Repeat in controlled pulses.
Stand tall and hinge forward at the hips to stretch the back of your legs.
Stand upright, lift heels off the floor while engaging pelvic floor muscles, then lower slowly.
Stand upright and contract pelvic floor muscles. Hold briefly, then relax.
Stand with feet wide and toes pointed outward. Lower into a squat while keeping chest upright.
Lie on your back, bring one knee across your body, and extend the opposite arm out to the side.
Lie on your back, lift legs and shoulders slightly, and pump arms up and down while breathing steadily.
Stand with legs wide apart. Reach one hand toward your front foot and extend the other arm upward, keeping your chest open.
Stand against a wall and slide down until knees are bent at 90 degrees. Hold the position while keeping core engaged.
Step one foot back and bend the front knee. Extend arms parallel to the floor and gaze over the front hand.
Balance on one leg while extending the other leg straight back and arms forward. Keep hips level and core engaged.
Start in a lunge position and jump upward, switching legs mid-air. Land softly and repeat.
Start on hands and knees. Extend one arm and the opposite leg while keeping hips level. Return and switch sides.
Lie on your stomach, bend your knees, and hold your ankles. Lift chest and thighs off the floor while breathing steadily.
Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Lift hips upward while engaging glutes and core, then lower slowly.
Sit with soles of feet together and knees bent outward. Gently press knees toward the floor while keeping back straight.
Kneel upright and gently arch your back, reaching hands toward your heels. Keep chest lifted and neck neutral.
On hands and knees, alternate between arching your back upward (cat) and dropping your belly while lifting your head (cow).
Stand with feet together, bend knees, and lower hips as if sitting back into a chair. Raise arms overhead and hold.
Kneel on the floor, sit back on your heels, and stretch arms forward while lowering your chest toward the floor.
Sit upright with the soles of your feet together and knees bent outward. Hold your feet and gently press your knees toward the floor while keeping your back straight.
Lie on your back with soles of feet together and knees apart. Engage your core and lift your shoulders off the floor while bringing your chest toward your hips.
Start on all fours with knees wide and feet outward. Lower onto your forearms and gently rock your hips back and forth to stretch the inner thighs and pelvic area.
Kneel upright with knees hip-width apart. Drive your hips forward while squeezing your glutes, then return to the starting position with control.
Sit with one leg bent in front and the other behind at 90 degrees. Rotate your hips to switch sides without lifting your feet off the floor.
Perform a glute bridge and, at the top, move your knees outward against tension before bringing them back together and lowering down.
